name: openapply
description: Job application tracking system with AI-powered features
author: Sergey Khval

scripts.bundle:vercel: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/app && cp -r astro/dist/* dist/ && cp -r spa/dist/* dist/app/
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm run build:spa && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run bundle:vercel
scripts.build: pnpm run build:spa && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run build:functions
scripts.test: pnpm --filter openapply-spa test && pnpm --filter openapply-functions test
